name: Worn Iron Sword
description: A well-used iron longsword. Merchants won't pay for it.

name: Goblin Sword
description: A crude short blade favored by goblins and orcs.

name: Small Sword
description: A compact crude blade sized for small fighters.

name: Spear
description: A long wooden-shafted spear tipped with iron.

name: Coin Pile
description: A small heap of loose copper coins.

name: Healing Potion
description: A crimson brew that knits wounds and restores vitality.

name: Scroll of Return
description: Reading the arcane runes whisks you back to town in a flash of light.

name: Scroll of Enchant Weapon
description: Arcane runes that hone your wielded weapon's edge — though greedy re-reading may destroy it.
